programme.title: Tombstone Canyon 1932
programme.desc: In Tombstone Canyon, cowboy hero Ken Maynard rides into a lawless valley shrouded in mystery. A masked outlaw known only as ‘The Phantom’ terrorizes the land, leaving fear in his wake. With danger around every corner and secrets buried deep in the canyon’s shadows, Maynard must uncover the truth and bring justice to a town on the brink.

programme.title: Billy the Kid Trapped (1942) Colorized
programme.desc: In Billy the Kid Trapped, Buster Crabbe returns as the notorious outlaw, hunted across the frontier with his pals Fuzzy (Al St. John) and Jeff (Malcolm ‘Bud’ McTaggart). When the trio is framed for crimes they didn’t commit, they must outwit the law, battle ruthless schemers, and fight to clear their names. Packed with fast-paced action, blazing gunfights, and lively camaraderie, this classic Western proves that even a wanted man can ride for justice.

programme.title: Kill Django... Kill First 1971
programme.desc: In Kill Django… Kill First, George Eastman stars as a deadly drifter who rides into a corrupt frontier town ruled by greed and gunmen. When the outlaws push too far, Django answers with blazing six-guns and relentless vengeance. Packed with gritty shootouts, treachery, and Spaghetti Western style, this action-filled tale proves that in the West, the first to draw is the last to survive.

programme.title: Frontier Town 1938
programme.desc: In Frontier Town, Tex Ritter rides into a lawless settlement torn apart by scheming outlaws and ruthless ambition. With his trusty six-shooter and a song in his heart, Tex takes a stand to protect the innocent and bring justice to the frontier. Blending hard-riding action, stirring melodies, and Ritter’s trademark charm, this Western adventure captures the spirit of the untamed West.

programme.title: Death Rides The Range 1939
programme.desc: In Death Rides the Range, a band of ruthless spies schemes to steal America’s uranium supply, but they didn’t count on the Three Mesquiteers! Leaping into action, the daring trio battles danger on the open frontier, matching fists, six-guns, and wits against a deadly enemy. Packed with intrigue, hard-riding action, and patriotic spirit, this adventure delivers Western thrills with a timely twist.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip
programme.desc: This past summer (2019), we met a new friend Jason, the CEO of the Catalina Island medical center in the city of Avalon. Jason mentioned that he was in charge of a campaign for the Catalina Island Medical Center Foundation. This campaign aims to raise money to build Catalina Island, a much-needed, state-of-the-art medical center. Jason asked us if we could be one of the big-ticket auction items from the list. We would provide a three-night stay on the stoked on a fishing yacht, two days of fishing on our Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot everglades, and provide fantastic food and drinks when we arrived back in Avalon. We love Catalina, and the idea of creating a hospital for the future of the Island was a no-brainer. We couldn't let this great opportunity go to waste and had epic two days of fishing in San Clemente Island with some new friends.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mann announces a reconnaissance and surveillance mission is imminent. programme.title: Waterfall Relaxation
programme.desc: Unwind with the sights and sounds of a spectacular cascading waterfall in Northern California. Burney falls is a spring fed waterfall that has been referred to as the "eighth wonder of the world". This new release also features scenes from Manzanita Lake in Lassen National Park, a scenic high alpine lake with abundant bird life. Relaxing waterfall sounds and bird songs make this a wonderful escape from the pressures of daily life. {[TrailerUrl:https://vimeo.com/793652147]}

programme.title: Trevor Baptiste: Pressure, Expectations, and What Comes Next
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Trevor Baptiste - the most dominant faceoff athlete of his generation - for an honest conversation about mentality, evolution, pressure, and the moments that shaped his journey to becoming an all-time great. From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.title: Rio Rattler (1935
programme.desc: A cowboy sets out to stop a gang of outlaws operating along the Rio Grande, uncovering a scheme of robbery and deception as he works to bring the criminals to justice and restore peace to the borderlands.

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Pines (1949
programme.desc: A group of singing cowboys sets out to protect a forest reserve from a gang of criminals using sabotage and intimidation to seize control of valuable timberland

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: Guns of the Law -.1944 52m
programme.desc: A determined lawman takes on a gang of outlaws threatening a frontier town, risking his life to restore justice and order in the Wild West

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon 1932
programme.desc: In Tombstone Canyon, cowboy hero Ken Maynard rides into a lawless valley shrouded in mystery. A masked outlaw known only as ‘The Phantom’ terrorizes the land, leaving fear in his wake. With danger around every corner and secrets buried deep in the canyon’s shadows, Maynard must uncover the truth and bring justice to a town on the brink.

programme.title: Billy the Kid Trapped (1942) Colorized
programme.desc: In Billy the Kid Trapped, Buster Crabbe returns as the notorious outlaw, hunted across the frontier with his pals Fuzzy (Al St. John) and Jeff (Malcolm ‘Bud’ McTaggart). When the trio is framed for crimes they didn’t commit, they must outwit the law, battle ruthless schemers, and fight to clear their names. Packed with fast-paced action, blazing gunfights, and lively camaraderie, this classic Western proves that even a wanted man can ride for justice.

programme.title: Kill Django... Kill First 1971
programme.desc: In Kill Django… Kill First, George Eastman stars as a deadly drifter who rides into a corrupt frontier town ruled by greed and gunmen. When the outlaws push too far, Django answers with blazing six-guns and relentless vengeance. Packed with gritty shootouts, treachery, and Spaghetti Western style, this action-filled tale proves that in the West, the first to draw is the last to survive.

programme.title: Frontier Town 1938
programme.desc: In Frontier Town, Tex Ritter rides into a lawless settlement torn apart by scheming outlaws and ruthless ambition. With his trusty six-shooter and a song in his heart, Tex takes a stand to protect the innocent and bring justice to the frontier. Blending hard-riding action, stirring melodies, and Ritter’s trademark charm, this Western adventure captures the spirit of the untamed West.

programme.title: Death Rides The Range 1939
programme.desc: In Death Rides the Range, a band of ruthless spies schemes to steal America’s uranium supply, but they didn’t count on the Three Mesquiteers! Leaping into action, the daring trio battles danger on the open frontier, matching fists, six-guns, and wits against a deadly enemy. Packed with intrigue, hard-riding action, and patriotic spirit, this adventure delivers Western thrills with a timely twist.
